refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved, analyze energy efficiency performance, and provide actionable feedback to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is high-level and needs decomposition into measurable and controllable sub-functions to enable design and verification. Monitoring, analysis, and feedback are key functions to achieve energy efficiency.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by measuring energy_per_ton = energy_used / ton_moved over the evaluation period and confirming it meets ≤ E_target; verify monitoring accuracy, analysis correctness, and feedback effectiveness.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Analyze energy efficiency performance against target.
FR3: Provide actionable feedback to operators or systems to improve energy efficiency.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy sensors and data acquisition systems to capture energy and tonnage data.
DP2: Implement energy efficiency analytics algorithms to evaluate performance.
DP3: Design feedback mechanisms (alerts, recommendations) integrated with operator interfaces or control systems.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to fulfill the refined FR sub-functions.

potential_sources: Data flow dependencies between monitoring and analytics.
coupling_check.notes: The DP mapping is mostly diagonal with clear functional independence; data dependencies are expected and managed.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data is available and reliable.
Risk of delayed or inaccurate feedback reducing effectiveness.
Analytics algorithms must be validated for correctness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing analytics and feedback to allow independent updates and reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level integration of energy monitoring, analytics, and feedback functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data on energy consumption and tonnage moved from Vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends feedback and recommendations to Vehicle operator or Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts if energy efficiency issues impact safety or operational policies.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module integrates all DP functions; low diffusion as interfaces are well defined.
Contains sensors but limited analytics; moderate diffusion due to data sharing.
Receives feedback but does not perform core analytics; moderate diffusion.
Receives alerts but not involved in core energy efficiency functions; higher diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing energy efficiency monitoring, analysis, and feedback in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves ownership clarity.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Risk of interface overload if too many data flows are routed through NGHE Solution.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting feedback delivery into Teleoperation or Vehicle modules if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs map clearly to selected DPs with manageable coupling and clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Potential diffusion if feedback mechanisms are not well modularized.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as ownership candidate; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and feedback effectiveness metrics.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of FRs to IM is clear with NGHE Solution as primary owner.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing feedback delivery to reduce diffusion risk.
Validate sensor data accuracy and analytics correctness early.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and mapping satisfies the requirements for this FR with clear DP and IM assignments and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Analyze energy efficiency performance against target.
FR3: Provide actionable feedback to operators or systems to improve energy efficiency.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sensor data is accurate and timely.
Feedback mechanisms are effective and timely.
open_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module.
Interface overload risk if data flows increase.
evidence_needed: Feedback effectiveness metrics from pilot tests.
